Skip to contents
abares 0.1.0
  • Reference

Read AGFD NCDF Files as a data.table

read_agfd_dt.Rd

Read Australian Gridded Farm Data, (AGFD) as a data.table object.

Usage

read_agfd_dt(files)

Arguments

files

A list of NetCDF files to import

Value

a data.table::data.table object of the Australian Gridded Farm Data

See also

Other read_agfd: read_agfd_stars(), read_agfd_terra(), read_agfd_tidync()

Examples

get_agfd(cache = TRUE) |>
  read_agfd_dt()
#>                                  id farmno R_total_hat_ha C_total_hat_ha
#>                              <char>  <num>          <num>          <num>
#>       1: f2022.c1991.p2022.t2022.nc  15612       7.636519       4.405228
#>       2: f2022.c1991.p2022.t2022.nc  21495      14.811169       9.165632
#>       3: f2022.c1991.p2022.t2022.nc  23418      24.874456      14.858595
#>       4: f2022.c1991.p2022.t2022.nc  24494      15.043653       9.326359
#>       5: f2022.c1991.p2022.t2022.nc  32429      23.630099      13.681063
#>      ---                                                                
#> 5554787: f2022.c2023.p2022.t2022.nc 668704     736.897286     460.817155
